settings.text: Micheal Deamrtino and his son Max are both part Italian, and their heritage is very important to them. Thus why the name MIGLIORE ® is so important. MIGLIORE ® means best in italian which is the main idea of MIGLIORE ®, to create the best and most affordable clothes for our customers. Additionally, the wolf symbolizes the Apennine wolf, which is the wolf that raised the two men who founded rome. The wolf also represents the strength, intelligence, and the determination of our community.
